overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a journey along the Great Ocean Highway. The player character moves from a roadside pull-off along the coastal highway with the Pacific Ocean visible on one side, traveling under a full moon before leaving the asphalt to explore dense coastal vegetation.

events.description: large white commercial truck with yellow stripe passes by on the highway
begins walking forward along the highway shoulder

agents.ego_description: starts stationary by the roadside then begins walking along the highway shoulder

notable_agents.action: large commercial box truck driving past on the highway

entered.detail: paved road surface with white lane markings
dark rocky hillside with sparse scrub vegetation
illuminated street lamp on tall wooden pole
dark colored cars parked at the roadside pull-off

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a roadside parking area at night, illuminated by a street light. A large truck passes by on the highway as the character begins walking along the shoulder. The mountain hillside rises on the right while parked cars sit to the left.

events.description: ocean becomes visible on the left side as the coastal highway curves
white van and multiple cars pass by on the highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder with the ocean visible to the left and traffic passing on the right

notable_agents.action: white commercial van driving along the highway
oncoming car with bright headlights approaching from the distance

entered.detail: dark ocean waves visible along the coastline
low concrete wall separating the road from the cliff edge
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along the coastal highway, the ocean becomes visible on the left beyond a concrete barrier, with palm trees silhouetted against the night sky. The mountain hillside looms closer on the right while various vehicles including a white van pass by on the road.

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the bright full moon through scattered clouds
large semi-truck with illuminated trailer passes by on the highway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway while looking up at the moon and observing the passing traffic

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with trailer driving past on the highway

entered.detail: bright full moon visible through scattered night clouds
dry desert bushes and scrub vegetation along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The highway continues through a more rural stretch where the full moon becomes visible in the night sky. The camera tilts upward to capture the moonlight filtering through clouds as a large semi-truck passes by. Dry scrub vegetation lines the roadside while the ocean remains visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coastal vegetation off the highway

events.description: leaves the paved highway and enters the dense coastal vegetation and bushes
pushes through thick bushes moving away from the road toward the coast

agents.ego_description: leaving the highway to explore the dark coastal vegetation, pushing through dense bushes and trees

entered.detail: thick dark green bushes and shrubs blocking the path
tall trees with dense foliage creating a canopy overhead
sandy soil and dry grass underfoot

segments.scene_description: Leaving the highway behind, the character enters dense coastal vegetation. The environment becomes enclosed as the camera pushes through thick bushes and trees, with the sky partially blocked by foliage. The ground changes from asphalt to sandy dirt as the character explores away from the road, with the ocean still visible in the distance through the vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a brightly lit roadside stop along a coastal highway into the secluded depths of dense nighttime vegetation. It begins in a parking area under the glow of a street light, moving along the shoulder as a large truck passes and a mountain hillside rises to the right. As the camera progresses along the highway, the view opens to reveal the Pacific Ocean beyond a concrete barrier and palm trees silhouetted against the dark sky. The scene then shifts toward a rural stretch where the camera tilts upward to capture a full moon filtering through clouds before the character leaves the asphalt behind. Finally, the environment becomes enclosed as the camera pushes through thick bushes and sandy dirt, with the ocean remaining visible only in the distance through the heavy foliage.
